messages.content: 查一下 DST 源码中 SetDomesticationTrigger 函数在哪个文件哪一行，然后读它周围10行代码

在 3982 个 Lua 文件中搜索 'SetDomesticationTrigger'，找到 2 条匹配：

━━━ components\domesticatable.lua:48 ━━━
       38 | {
       39 | 	domesticated = ondomesticated,
       40 | })
       41 | 
       42 | function Domesticatable:OnRemoveFromEntity()
       43 |     self:CancelTask()
       44 |     self.inst:RemoveTag("domesticatable")
       45 | 	self.inst:RemoveTag("domesticated")
       46 | end
       47 | 
  ▶    48 | function Domesticatable:SetDomesticationTrigger(fn)
       49 |     self.domestication_triggerfn = fn
       50 | end
       51 | 
       52 | function Domesticatable:GetObedience()
       53 |     return self.obedience
       54 | end
       55 | 
       56 | function Domesticatable:GetDomestication()
       57 |     return self.domestication
       58 | end

━━━ prefabs\beefalo.lua:1216 ━━━
     1206 |     inst.components.trader.onrefuse = OnRefuseItem
     1207 |     inst.components.trader.deleteitemonaccept = false
     1208 | 
     1209 |     inst:AddComponent("hunger")
     1210 |     inst.components.hunger:SetMax(TUNING.BEEFALO_HUNGER)
     1211 |     inst.components.hunger:SetRate(TUNING.BEEFALO_HUNGER_RATE)
     1212 |     inst.components.hunger:SetPercent(0)
     1213 |     inst.components.hunger:SetOverrideStarveFn(OnStarving)
     1214 | 
     1215 |     inst:AddComponent("domesticatable")
  ▶  1216 |     inst.components.domesticatable:SetDomesticationTrigger(DomesticationTriggerFn)
     1217 | 
     1218 |     MakeLargeBurnableCharacter(inst, "beefalo_body")
     1219 |     MakeLargeFreezableCharacter(inst, "beefalo_body")
     1220 | 
     1221 |     inst:AddComponent("locomotor") -- locomotor must be constructed before the stategraph
     1222 |     inst.components.locomotor.walkspeed = TUNING.BEEFALO_WALK_SPEED
     1223 |     inst.components.locomotor.runspeed = TUNING.BEEFALO_RUN_SPEED.DEFAULT
     1224 | 
     1225 |     inst:AddComponent("sleeper")
     1226 |     inst.components.sleeper:SetResistance(3)
messages.name: grep

messages.content:
搜索结果中已经包含了足够的上下文，无需额外读取文件。下面是总结：

---

## 结果

### 定义位置：`components/domesticatable.lua` 第 48 行

```lua
42 | function Domesticatable:OnRemoveFromEntity()
43 |     self:CancelTask()
44 |     self.inst:RemoveTag("domesticatable")
45 |     self.inst:RemoveTag("domesticated")
46 | end
47 |
48 | function Domesticatable:SetDomesticationTrigger(fn)
49 |     self.domestication_triggerfn = fn
50 | end
51 |
52 | function Domesticatable:GetObedience()
53 |     return self.obedience
54 | end
55 |
56 | function Domesticatable:GetDomestication()
57 |     return self.domestication
58 | end
```

**逻辑很简单**：接收一个函数 `fn`，把它存到 `self.domestication_triggerfn`。之后组件内部会在驯化状态变化时回调这个函数。

---

### 调用位置：`prefabs/beefalo.lua` 第 1216 行

```lua
1215 | inst:AddComponent("domesticatable")
1216 | inst.components.domesticatable:SetDomesticationTrigger(DomesticationTriggerFn)
```

在 beefalo 预制体初始化时，添加 `domesticatable` 组件后立即注册了驯化触发器 `DomesticationTriggerFn`，用于响应驯化度变化事件。
